__flatpak-app-cache.name: {name} cache
__flatpak-app-cache.description: Clean Flatpak application cache without deleting configuration, login state, or local data.

__flatpak-app-data.name: {name} app data
__flatpak-app-data.description: Reset Flatpak application data and configuration. Login state, local databases, and app configuration will be deleted.

brave-cache.name: Brave cache
brave-cache.description: Brave page resource cache. Bookmarks, passwords, and history are not included.

bun-cache-clean.name: Bun cache
bun-cache-clean.description: Call Bun to clean package manager cache. Packages will be downloaded again when installing dependencies.

cargo-cache.name: Cargo cache
cargo-cache.description: Cargo package and Git dependency cache. Rust projects will download dependencies again when building.

ccache-cache.name: ccache cache
ccache-cache.description: C/C++ compiler cache. Compilation may be slower temporarily after cleaning.

chrome-cache.name: Chrome cache
chrome-cache.description: Chrome page resource cache. Bookmarks, passwords, and history are not included.

chromium-cache.name: Chromium cache
chromium-cache.description: Chromium page resource cache. Bookmarks, passwords, and history are not included.

dnf-cache-clean.name: DNF/YUM cache
dnf-cache-clean.description: Call the system package manager to clean package, metadata, and database caches.

pacman-cache-clean.name: Pacman cache
pacman-cache-clean.description: Clean Arch Linux package cache and sync database cache.

paru-cache.name: Paru cache
paru-cache.description: Clean paru AUR build and download cache.

edge-cache.name: Edge cache
edge-cache.description: Microsoft Edge page resource cache. Bookmarks, passwords, and history are not included.

firefox-cache.name: Firefox cache
firefox-cache.description: Firefox page resource cache. Bookmarks, passwords, and history are not included.

flatpak-cache.name: Flatpak download cache
flatpak-cache.description: Clean Flatpak downloads, temporary repositories, and system cache directories.

flatpak-unused-runtimes.name: Unused Flatpak runtimes
flatpak-unused-runtimes.description: Call flatpak to clean runtimes and extensions no longer required by applications. Size cannot be estimated reliably in advance.

fontconfig-cache.name: Font index cache
fontconfig-cache.description: Font lookup cache. The system will rebuild it the next time fonts are loaded.

go-cache.name: Go build cache
go-cache.description: Go build and module download cache. Builds will regenerate or download dependencies again.

gtk-cache.name: GTK cache
gtk-cache.description: GTK component cache. Desktop apps will rebuild it as needed.

homebrew-cache-clean.name: Homebrew cache
homebrew-cache-clean.description: Call Homebrew to clean download cache and old version cache.

yay-cache.name: Yay cache
yay-cache.description: Clean yay AUR build and download cache.

inet-cache.name: System network cache
inet-cache.description: Windows user network cache. The system will rebuild it as needed.

media-framework-cache.name: Media framework cache
media-framework-cache.description: GStreamer and Glycin media processing cache. It will be rebuilt as needed.

mozilla-cache.name: Firefox cache
mozilla-cache.description: Firefox page resource cache. Bookmarks, passwords, and history are not included.

npm-cache-clean.name: npm cache
npm-cache-clean.description: Call npm to clean download cache. Packages will be downloaded again when installing dependencies.

pip-cache-clean.name: pip cache
pip-cache-clean.description: Call pip to clean wheel cache. Packages will be downloaded again when installing dependencies.

playwright-cache.name: Playwright cache
playwright-cache.description: Browser cache downloaded by Playwright. Browsers will be downloaded again when running tests.

pnpm-cache.name: pnpm cache
pnpm-cache.description: pnpm download cache. Packages will be downloaded again when installing dependencies.

safari-cache.name: Safari cache
safari-cache.description: Safari page resource cache. Bookmarks and passwords are not included.

shader-cache.name: Graphics shader cache
shader-cache.description: Mesa, Radeon, and Qt/GTK rendering cache. It will be rebuilt as needed.

system-cache.name: System user cache
system-cache.description: macOS user cache directory. Apps will regenerate caches as needed.

temp-files.name: Temporary files
temp-files.description: Windows user temp directory. Files currently in use will fail to clean and be kept.

thumbnail-cache.name: Thumbnail cache
thumbnail-cache.description: Image and video preview cache. The system will regenerate it when needed.

user-logs.name: User logs
user-logs.description: macOS user log directory. Cleaning may affect application troubleshooting.

uv-cache.name: uv cache
uv-cache.description: uv Python package manager cache. Packages will be downloaded again when installing dependencies.

vscode-cache.name: VS Code cache
vscode-cache.description: Editor cache, Webview cache, and extension cache. Some resources may need to reload after cleaning.
